title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE SITIO OF IGDACOTON IN THE BARRIO OF MAGDALENA, MUNICIPALITY OF ANINI-Y, PROVINCE OF ANTIQUE, INTO A BARRIO TO BE KNOWN AS THE BARRIO OF SAN RAMON.

chunks.text:
H. No. 4573 / 53 OG No. 15, 4780 (August 15, 1957)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1661, June 20, 1957 ]

AN ACT CONVERTING THE SITIO OF IGDACOTON IN THE BARRIO OF MAGDALENA, MUNICIPALITY OF ANINI-Y, PROVINCE OF ANTIQUE, INTO A BARRIO TO BE KNOWN AS THE BARRIO OF SAN RAMON.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sitio of Igdacoton in the barrio of Magdalena, Municipality of Anini-y, Province of Antique, is hereby converted into a barrio to be known as the barrio of San Ramon.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 20, 1957.
